sourceAmbiguity: Phone-origin requests need context, but not a phone-only status vocabulary.
decisionTaken: Allowed phone-origin provenance chips only as additive notes under the canonical status headline.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The entry channel can clarify sequence without changing receipt or status semantics.
operationalRisk: Patients may over-read provenance notes if they are visually promoted.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Keep provenance chips below the headline and forbid primary-status use in validators.
